notes: Antigravity foreground subagent, UNBLOCKED by subagent linking (antigravity_subagent.go). The parent spawns ONE subagent via define_subagent + invoke_subagent; the child runs as its OWN top-level conversation brain/<child>/, discovered as its own session (transcript_new). AntigravityParentConvID scans sibling brain transcripts for the parent whose INVOKE_SUBAGENT step references the child's conversationId and the detector emits parent_linked (child.ParentSessionID = parent.session_id). SubagentCount(parent)=1 while the child is alive; the parent is held working while the child is alive and settles working->ready only after the child ends. ORDERING (live 2026-06-20): the parent goes working FIRST, then the child transcript materializes and parent_linked fires within ~16ms — so there is no fresh parent working transition AFTER parent_linked; the held-working property is asserted as the parent's working state PERSISTING across the child's lifetime (duration_at_least_ms) with the no-ready/no-waiting invariant, anchored at the parent's working transition. The child runs inside the parent's invoke with no own agy process, so the child session stays pid=0 (transcript-first, first-class) — assert ParentSessionID linkage + subagent summary, NOT a child PID. Requires a capable model (Gemini 3.1 Pro High / 3.5 Flash) — GPT-OSS 120B fumbles the schema. Model harvested from <USER_SETTINGS_CHANGE> ('Gemini 3.1 Pro'). Tokens/cost NOT in the antigravity JSONL.

text: Parent conv-id session appears in ready when transcript.jsonl is written

invariants: no state_transition to ready for parent
no state_transition to waiting for parent
text: The spawn prompt drives the parent ready -> working, and the parent stays working for at least the child's lifetime (does not flip to ready/waiting while the child is alive) — reevaluateParent holds it on hasActiveChildren
The subagent's own conversation transcript materializes at brain/<child>/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl — fswatcher discovers a new SessionState for the child

AntigravityParentConvID resolves the parent (the sibling conversation whose INVOKE_SUBAGENT step references the child conv-id); detector emits parent_linked binding child.session_id -> parent.session_id. SubagentCount(parent)=1 while the child is alive.
After the child reports back and ends, the parent transitions working -> ready (only after the last child ends)
